author: vvo
subject: v1.6.1
body: ## [1.6.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.6.0...v1.6.1) (2016-06-20) ### Bug Fixes * **meteorjs:** lite build must point to the browser lite (#1097) ([265ace3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/265ace3)) * **toggle:** read numerical facet results stats for toggle count (#1098) ([1feb539](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/1feb539)), closes [#1096](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1096) * **website:** footer wording ([8355460](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/8355460))
